prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the 2.9L TFSI V6 (engine code: **DDWA**) with upgraded **Garrett GT2867R-5 turbochargers** (hybrid billet wheels, 0.64 A/R turbine housings) and **APR High-Flow Carbon Fiber Intake System** (designed for the RS4 B9’s dual-inlet airbox), pushing **520 HP and 550 Nm** on 98 RON fuel with **APR’s proprietary RS4-specific wastegate control strategy**

Full **034 Motorsport RS4 B9 3.0L TFSI Cooling System Upgrade** (aluminum radiator, dual-core intercooler with 40% increased flow, and **GReddy Profec EVO 2 Boost Controller** for precise turbo spool mapping), paired with a **Porsche 991.2 GT3 RS-spec oil cooler** (mounted in the front bumper for optimal airflow)

KW Suspension **Clubsport Coilovers (3-way adjustable)** with **034 Motorsport RS4 B9-specific camber plates** (allowing -4.5° front camber) and **H&R RS4 B9-specific 20mm spacers** (for aggressive flush fitment with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 R20 front, 285/30 R20 rear)** on **BBS FI-R 9.5x20 ET35 wheels**)
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 Widebody Kit for RS4 B9 Avant** (carbon fiber fenders with 50mm extended wheel arches, custom rear diffuser with integrated **Akrapović titanium exhaust tips**, and **Vorsteiner RS4-specific carbon fiber hood** with functional heat extractors)

**Audi Sport ABT RS4 B9 Avant Front Lip (carbon fiber)** with **3D Carbon RS4 B9 Avant side skirts** (matched to the Rocket Bunny kit) and **OEM+ RS4 B9 Avant rear spoiler extension (carbon fiber, 30mm taller than stock)** for improved high-speed stability

**VMR V710 RS4 B9-specific wheels (9.5x20 ET35 front, 10.5x20 ET35 rear)** in **Gunmetal with polished lip**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 R20 front, 285/30 R20 rear)**, paired with **AP Racing RS4 B9-specific 380mm front brake discs (2-piece, slotted)** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for track-ready stopping power
